LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO NEGLIGENCE AND CAUSATION THROUGH THE DECLARATION OF DR. GARDINER, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington, LLP,415-288-9800 for defendant and moving party The Regents of The University Of California
Erik Peterson, Esq. of Bostwick, Peterson & Mitchell, LLP, 888-421-8300 for plaintiff and opposing party Susan Pak

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO NEGLIGENCE AND CAUSATION THROUGH THE DECLARATION OF DR. GARDINER, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
